# Token

## Function

This API is used to get system upgrade Token.

## Request Message

| Parameter | Range | Type | Description |

| file_name | len:0-256 | string | upgrade file name. |

| upgrade_head | size:3 * 1024 | int array | 1KB data before the upgrade file. |
